acquire_hardware.goal: Smelt an Iron Ingot. Have an iron ingot in the inventory.

hot_stuff.goal: Fill a Bucket with lava. Have a lava bucket in the inventory.

diamonds.goal: Acquire diamonds. Have a diamond in the inventory.

moar_tools.goal: Construct one pickaxe, one shovel, one axe, and one hoe with the same material.

cover_me_in_diamonds.goal: Acquire a diamond chestplate. Have a diamond chestplate in the inventory.

ice_bucket_challenge.goal: Obtain a block of Obsidian. Have a block of obsidian in the inventory.

the_lie.goal: Bake a cake. Have a cake in the inventory.
